The '''Republic Measures & Standards Bureau (RM&S)''' was the branch of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] government responsible for maintaining common units of measurement, including time (and presumably weighting, money, and other similar quantities). It was responsible for the [[Great ReSynchronization]] setting of time, and presumably for the calendar setting "Year 0" at the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]]. As of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], another debate was already underway within the Bureau over which dating system to use.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|life/13228_2.html|RM&S; Debates Calendar Reform}} {{1st}}
